types.name: Rotary Potentiometer
types.description: Wiper moves via a rotating shaft.

types.name: Linear (Slide) Pot
types.description: Wiper slides along a straight track.

types.name: Logarithmic Taper
types.description: Resistance changes logarithmically; matches human hearing.

types.name: Digital Potentiometer
types.description: Integrated Circuit (IC) that emulates a pot via switches.
